imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark industrial banner with bold gold lettering and a gritty texture background, suitable for a tycoon-themed app header (makeshift-moguls-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
- Gold coin stack icon illustration on a dark background (mogul-coin-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Build a React frontend for Makeshift Moguls that connects to the backend canister. The app should display a list of entities (e.g., moguls/players), allow adding a new entry with a name, and show each entry's name and score.

Apply a bold, industrial tycoon visual theme across the entire frontend. Use a dark charcoal and gold color palette with strong typography, gritty textures or subtle geometric patterns, and a confident layout that feels like a deal-making mogul empire. Enforce this style consistently across all pages and components.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a Motoko backend actor with a basic data model suitable for a business/mogul-themed platform. Include at minimum: a persistent store for named entities (e.g., players or users with a name and score), and query/update functions to create, read, and list them.
